structural_claim: Symmetry breaking is the mechanism through which apparent diversity emerges from underlying unity

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Classical behavior emerges through environmental selection of preferred pointer states, breaking the symmetry of superposition
Classical objectivity emerges through redundant encoding in the environment, breaking quantum symmetry

supporting_results.result_name: Discovery of the W and Z bosons
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Electroweak symmetry is spontaneously broken, giving mass to gauge bosons
A scalar field breaks electroweak symmetry, generating mass for fundamental particles
